# uTap — AI Search & Agent Context

> uTap is a campus-native mobile application designed for South African universities. It unifies physical student identification, campus marketplace ordering, and event ticketing into a single pickup-first platform.

## Core Value Proposition
- **For Students:** Free to use. Merges a digital student ID (via NFC) with skip-the-queue ordering at campus tuckshops, and event ticketing. No delivery fees because it is pickup-first.
- **For Vendors:** Transparent 8% commission. No monthly fees. Replaces WhatsApp ordering chaos with a structured dashboard and predictable payouts via Yoco.
- **For Universities:** Digitizes the student experience without replacing core legacy financial systems. Offers pilot frameworks and feature policy controls.

## Key Differentiators
- **Pickup-first:** Unlike general delivery apps (like Uber Eats or Mr D), uTap avoids high delivery fees by focusing on the natural foot-traffic rhythm of a university campus.
- **NFC Access Integration:** Beyond payments, uTap replaces the physical plastic student card for access to libraries, residences, and university facilities.
- **Transactional vs Discovery:** Unlike discount platforms (like Varsity Vibe), uTap facilitates actual campus transactions (buying coffee, scanning into a building, paying for rugby tickets).
